children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: There is in the Department of Defense an Office of Local Defense Community Cooperation (in this section referred to as the “Office”). The Secretary shall designate the Office as a Department of Defense Field Activity pursuant to section 191, effective as of the date of the enactment of the William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 ().Public Law 116–283
Experience in the interagency in the Executive Branch.
Experience in the administration and management of Federal grants programs.

children.label: A
children.text: providing assistance to States, counties, municipalities, regions, and other communities to foster cooperation with military installations to enhance the military mission, achieve facility and infrastructure savings and reduced operating costs, address encroachment and compatible land use issues, support military families, and increase military, civilian, and industrial readiness and resiliency; and

children.label: B
children.text: providing adjustment and diversification assistance to State and local governments under to achieve the objectives described in subparagraph (A);section 2391(b) of this title
coordinate the provision of such assistance with other organizations and elements of the Department;
provide support to the Economic Adjustment Committee established under Executive Order No. 12788 (57 Fed. Reg. 2213; note) or any successor to such Committee; and10 U.S.C. 2391
carry out such other activities as the Secretary considers appropriate.

children.heading: .—Annual Report to Congress
children.label: d .—Annual Report to Congress
children.text: Not later than June 1 each year, the Director of the Office of Local Defense Community Cooperation shall submit to the congressional defense committees a report on the activities of the Office during the preceding year, including the assistance provided pursuant to subsection (c)(1) during such year.
